title: Way to Grave
description: Keep your items safe after death in a Grave.
body:
Keep your items safe after death in a Grave.

When you die, a grave containing all your items will spawn at your death location.
You then will spawn with a Recovery Compass so you can find your Grave an recover your items.

![Grave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f522483c786d764b72bee2d0414dd5ca3431e17.png)

---
# Configuration:
Use ``/trigger wtg`` to access the config menu.
- A percentage of your XP will be store (50% as default, configurable).
- You can choose to get the Recovery Compass enchanted allowing you to teleport to your Grave.
- Only you can open your own Grave (configurable).
![Config Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a133c89de7661b70047d1a6c079a50766853f07c.png)

# Admin option:
By adding the tag _wtg_admin_ with the command ``/tag add <player> wtg_admin``. A new option will show in the config menu to allow only admins to edit the config.
